name: Athletic Mixed-Race Girl (Clean Version)
description: Athletic Eurasian girl without sweat or wet hair. Anne Hathaway's eyes + Song Hye Kyo's face shape + Natalie Portman's strong nose. Clean dry hair.
face_dna: [Anne Hathaway] (warm clear eyes) + [Song Hye Kyo] (soft oval face, gentle almond eyes) + [Natalie Portman] (straight nose, elegant aura)

body_map: Athletic and slim build, long limbs, flat firm abdomen, pale clean skin. No visible tattoos or scars.
physics: Type 1 (Basic). Scene-dependent clothing. Clean and dry baseline.
